html:
2026-0303
2026-03-31AAFC, FINAgricultural Marketing Programs ActRegulations Amending the Agricultural Marketing Programs Regulations (2026)Regulations Amending the Agricultural Marketing Programs Regulations (2026) in order to temporarily increase the Advance Payments Program (APP)’s interest-free limit such as the portion of advances that the Government pays the interest from $100,000 to $250,000 for all non-canola advances for the 2026 program year.Registration: SOR/2026-0066 Publication Date: 2026-04-22
subject: Regulations Amending the Agricultural Marketing Programs Regulations (2026)
precis: Regulations Amending the Agricultural Marketing Programs Regulations (2026) in order to temporarily increase the Advance Payments Program (APP)’s interest-free limit such as the portion of advances that the Government pays the interest from $100,000 to $250,000 for all non-canola advances for the 2026 program year.
